name: openhuman
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        tinyhumansai /

      openhuman  

    
      Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
summary: OpenHuman 是一个用 Rust 构建的个人AI超级智能助手，强调隐私、简洁和强大性能，值得关注因为它将先进AI能力封装为本地化、轻量级的私有工具，兼顾安全性与极致效率。

name: supertonic
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        supertone-inc /

      supertonic  

    
      Lightning-Fast, On-Device, Multilingual TTS — running natively via ONNX.
summary: supertone-inc/supertonic 是一个基于ONNX的本地多语言语音合成（TTS）项目，运行速度极快且完全离线。它值得关注是因为在设备端实现了低延迟、多语言的高质量语音合成，兼顾了隐私与性能。

name: video-search-and-summarization
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        NVIDIA-AI-Blueprints /

      video-search-and-summarization  

    
      Suite of reference architectures for building GPU-accelerated vision agents and AI-powered video analytics applications.
summary: 该项目提供了一套基于GPU加速的参考架构，用于构建AI驱动的视频搜索与摘要应用，因其结合了NVIDIA硬件优化与高效视觉分析能力，值得关注。

name: qiaomu-anything-to-notebooklm
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        joeseesun /

      qiaomu-anything-to-notebooklm  

    
      Claude Skill: Multi-source content processor for NotebookLM. Supports WeChat articles, web pages, YouTube, PDF, Markdown, search queries → Podcast/PPT/MindMap/Quiz etc.
summary: 该项目可将微信文章、网页、YouTube、PDF等多种来源的内容，一键转换为NotebookLM支持的播客、PPT、思维导图等格式，极大简化了信息整理与再创作的流程。

name: RuView
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        ruvnet /

      RuView  

    
      π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
summary: RuView 利用普通 WiFi 信号实现实时空间感知、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需任何摄像头，因其低成本、隐私保护且基于 Rust 的高性能特性而值得关注。

name: bun
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        oven-sh /

      bun  

    
      Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
summary: Bun 是一个用 Rust 编写的极速 JavaScript 运行时，集打包器、测试运行器和包管理器于一体，因其惊人的性能和“一站式”替代 Node.js 生态的潜力而备受关注。

name: czlonkowski
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        czlonkowski /

      n8n-mcp  

    
      A MCP for Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Windsurf / Cursor to build n8n workflows for you
summary: 该项目是一个为Claude Desktop、Claude Code、Windsurf和Cursor等AI工具提供的MCP（模型上下文协议）服务器，能够自动构建n8n工作流。值得关注的是它让AI直接帮你生成自动化工作流，大幅提升了n8n的使用效率和开发体验。

name: scientific-agent-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        K-Dense-AI /

      scientific-agent-skills  

    
      A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.
summary: 该项目提供一套即用的智能体技能，覆盖科研、工程、金融与写作等领域，值得关注是因为它降低了构建专业AI助手的技术门槛。
